title: LagGuard
description: LagGuard is a Minecraft plugin designed to protect a player's inventory from being lost during high-ping deaths.
body:
LagGuard: Your Ping Protection Plugin
LagGuard is an essential Minecraft server plugin designed to protect players from losing their inventory due to high-ping deaths. In a fast-paced game, a sudden lag spike can lead to an unfair death and the loss of valuable items. This plugin ensures that your players' hard-earned gear is always safe.

Key Features:
Inventory Protection: Automatically saves and restores a player's inventory if their ping exceeds a configurable threshold at the moment of death.

Ping-Based Activation: The protection mechanism is triggered by a high ping, ensuring that only players genuinely affected by lag are protected.

Anti-Cheat System: Includes a sophisticated check to prevent players from faking high ping to abuse the system. The plugin verifies ping at both death and respawn to ensure legitimacy.

Lightweight & Efficient: Designed to run smoothly without causing any performance issues on your server.

Customizable: Server owners can easily configure the ping threshold and other settings to suit their needs.
